category_sources: Official project documentation describes automatic move detection for Terraform refactoring.
source_facts.description says tfautomv generates Terraform moved blocks automatically for refactoring.
display_name_sources: Official repository and documentation use the display name tfautomv.
docs_sources: Official release notes state the project documentation previously on tfautomv.dev is now in the repository README.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official tfautomv documentation covers Terraform/OpenTofu moves and moved block generation.
source_facts.description identifies Terraform moved blocks and refactoring.
